The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF WILLIAM STEVENS and JASMINE MCFADDEN's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD is GRANTED. Court finds good cause. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with tentative ruling. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Continued To Jul-17-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to July 17, 2013 to be heard in Department 501 at 9:30 am. Moving party shall comply with Local Rule 2.6C and provide a courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date by June 17 at 4:00 pm. Opposing party shall comply with Local Rule 2.6B and provide a courtesy copy of the declaration in support of opposition filed on June 4 to Department 501 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date by June 17 at 4:00 pm. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
